name: Immich
desc: Self-hosted photo and video backup platform with external services configuration
defaultEnv:
TZ=UTC
UPLOAD_LOCATION=/usr/src/app/upload
DB_HOSTNAME=postgres
DB_USERNAME=postgres
DB_PASSWORD=changeme
DB_DATABASE_NAME=immich
REDIS_HOSTNAME=redis

presets.name: Library Only
presets.desc: Minimal filesystem preset for attaching an existing media path

presets.name: External DB + Redis
presets.desc: Preset for environments where Postgres and Redis already exist
presets.defaultEnv:
TZ=UTC
UPLOAD_LOCATION=/usr/src/app/upload
DB_HOSTNAME=postgres.internal
DB_USERNAME=immich
DB_PASSWORD=changeme
DB_DATABASE_NAME=immich
REDIS_HOSTNAME=redis.internal
